verdict_reason: KD=30 is borderline, Vol=720 decent, CPC=$1.31. But AI Overview present and SERP dominated by WebMD/drugs.com/Medscape — YMYL health sites with massive authority. Only metabolics.com is a small player. Very hard to outrank medical authority sites.

keyword_cluster.keyword: can I take berberine with citrus bergamot

serp_analysis.opportunity_note: YMYL niche dominated by medical authority sites. metabolics.com ranking shows some opening but competing with WebMD/drugs.com requires exceptional content and E-E-A-T signals. Could target specific supplement-only interactions rather than drug interactions.

watch_notes: Look for supplement-specific long-tail like 'berberine interaction checker', 'magnesium supplement interactions'. The supplement angle (not drug) might have less YMYL competition than drug interaction checkers.
